lead.description: EntreCORPS is a growth and innovation strategy consulting firm. By recruiting selectively from across the University of Illinois campus, expertise is brought together to create high-impact and entrepreneurial solutions for clients. EntreCORPS collaborates with clients ranging from early stage ventures to innovation-driving groups within Fortune 500 companies.
